SDPDF.Done: PDF character sheet for {name} is downloading.
SDPDF.Error: Failed to generate the PDF character sheet. See the console (F12) for details.
SDPDF.Export.Title: Export Character Sheet
SDPDF.Export.HeroSub: Pick a layout to export a filled sheet for {name}.
SDPDF.Export.DescFantasy2024: A richly styled fantasy layout for the 2024 rules. Ships with the module — ready to export.
SDPDF.Export.DescFantasy2014: A richly styled fantasy layout for the 2014 rules, with shields, banners and a spellbook. Ships with the module — ready to export.
SDPDF.Export.DescFan2024: A clean, community-made sheet following the 2024 rules. Bundled and free to use.
SDPDF.Export.Desc2024: The official Wizards of the Coast 2024 sheet. Copyrighted, so you point the module at your own copy.
SDPDF.Export.Desc2014: The official Wizards of the Coast 2014 sheet. Copyrighted, so you point the module at your own copy.
SDPDF.Export.NotProvided: This official sheet is copyrighted and cannot be bundled with the module. Download your own copy, upload it to Foundry, then browse to it here.
SDPDF.Export.MissingOfficial: That official sheet has not been provided yet. Use the export dialog to download and select it first.
